name: FIREZ 1500 Electric Fireplace
shortDescription: The FIREZ 1500 combines stunning panoramic flame visuals with an ultra-slim 190mm installation depth, perfect for modern media walls where space is at a premium.
description:
The FIREZ 1500 is our most popular fireplace, offering the perfect balance of size, style and performance. Its impressive widescreen flame display creates a striking centrepiece, making it an ideal choice for modern media walls and open-plan living spaces.

Featuring one of the most realistic 3D reflective flame effects available, the FIREZ 1500 delivers the ambience of a real wood-burning fire without the mess, maintenance or inconvenience.
features: Adjustable ember bed and overhead lighting colours
High-definition interchangeable log fuel bed included
Optional upgrade to a deluxe real log fuel bed
closingText: Whether you're creating a contemporary media wall or transforming your living room into a luxurious focal point, the FIREZ 1500 offers exceptional flexibility and outstanding visual impact. Personalise the flame colours and lighting to create the perfect atmosphere all year round, with or without the heat.
callToAction: Available from Zebra Trades with supply only or professional installation.
